channel.title: Ranjita Naik — writing
channel.description: Notes on things I'm figuring out, explained from first principles.

item.title: Make it remember — give your AI agent a memory
item.description: Your agent starts every session with a blank memory, so you keep re-explaining yourself. A small file called CLAUDE.md fixes it — here's how, from first principles.

item.title: Build a webpage with an AI agent — no code
item.description: In about 20 minutes, get a real webpage open in your browser without writing a line of code — by describing what you want to an AI agent.

item.title: What actually is an AI agent? A plain-English guide
item.description: The chatbot-vs-agent distinction, the three ingredients, and the questions worth asking before you build or buy one.

item.title: The agent loop, animated — an interactive explainer
item.description: Step through a real agent run: thoughts, tool calls, a failure and its recovery, with live token and cost counters.

item.title: Start here: AI, LLMs and agents — explained from scratch
item.description: Assumes nothing — not even what LLM means. What an LLM is, what an agent is, and why people are talking about them.
